name: Supremes En Vermouth
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and bone the chicken breasts. Cut each breast in half.
2. Dip the halves into sour cream.
3. Roll the halves in bread crumbs.
4. Roll up the bread-crumb-encased meat and place it in a greased baking pan.
5. Drizzle with melted butter and vermouth.
6. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes.
Sauce:
1. Prepare a sauce by combining 1 can condensed Cream of Mushroom Soup (or Cream of Chicken Soup or both) with half a can of light cream.
2. Add the vermouth and heat until it reaches bubbling consistency.
